description_long: This object is a modern crossbow featuring a robust black frame with a tactical design, including a mounted scope for precision aiming. The limbs are wide and recurved, connected by strong cables and a central riser, while the stock is ergonomic with a pistol grip for comfortable handling. A single arrow (bolt) is loaded along the top rail, and a blue accent is visible on the front grip area. The crossbow is equipped with a shoulder strap for portability and a foot stirrup at the front for easier cocking. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and high-strength polymer, with some visible screws and mechanical components. The design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban tactical or sporting scenarios.
description: A modern black crossbow with a mounted scope, ergonomic stock, and a loaded arrow, featuring blue accents and a tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide recurved limbs, central riser, and blue front grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mounted scope, loaded arrow, ergonomic stock, and shoulder strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the string, cable system, and the back of the scope and stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the crossbow, including the foot stirrup and mechanical details.
